common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: user_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a user.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by(depends on different APIs) partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token,  user_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm.

define: Update live stream information, including cover, title, description, and type (test live or normal live). (For TW, ID, TH, PH, MY, SG, VN)

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

request_params.description: The title of the livestream session, cannot exceed 200 characters.
request_params.name: title

request_params.description: The description of the livestream session, cannot exceed 200 characters.
request_params.name: description

request_params.description:
The cover image url of the livestream session.

Please call the v2.livestream.upload_image to upload the cover image file and get the cover_image_url.
request_params.name: cover_image_url

request_params.description: Indicate whether this livestream session if for testing purpose only.
request_params.name: is_test

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/livestream/update_session?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "cover_image_url": "https://cf.shopee.sg/file/id-11134104-7r98o-m9pqmldbyce282",
    "description": "test desc",
    "is_test": false,
    "session_id": 6236215,
    "title": "test title"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/livestream/update_session?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
   "cover_image_url": "https://cf.shopee.sg/file/id-11134104-7r98o-m9pqmldbyce282",
   "description": "test desc",
   "is_test": false,
   "session_id": 6236215,
   "title": "test title"
}'

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/livestream/update_session?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id"

payload=json.dumps({
  "cover_image_url": "https://cf.shopee.sg/file/id-11134104-7r98o-m9pqmldbyce282",
  "description": "test desc",
  "is_test": False,
  "session_id": 6236215,
  "title": "test title"
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.RPCRequest("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)

value.message: The session(session_id:6236215) is not belong to you
